title: Auralyze Audio Production OKF
description: Structured local knowledge for audio diagnosis, mixing, mastering, and repair.

entries.title: Muddy Vocal Low Mids
causes: too much 180 Hz to 350 Hz energy
guitars, keys, or pads masking the vocal body
compression raising room tone or low-mid buildup
fixes: cut 220 Hz to 320 Hz gently on competing instruments before boosting the vocal
add a small presence boost around 2.5 kHz to 4 kHz after level matching
use dynamic EQ when muddiness appears only on louder phrases

entries.title: Kick And Bass Sub Conflict
symptoms: low end changes a lot between speakers
causes: kick and bass both occupying 45 Hz to 90 Hz
fixes: choose either kick or bass as the sub owner
use sidechain compression or dynamic EQ from kick to bass

entries.title: Harsh Brightness Fatigue
causes: too much 3 kHz to 8 kHz energy
fixes: reduce narrow resonances between 3 kHz and 8 kHz
compare at matched loudness before cutting too much top end

entries.title: Reference Match Mastering
symptoms: master does not sound like reference
causes: reference was judged louder instead of better
low end and high end are not compared at matched loudness
fixes: loudness-match the reference before judging tone
compare low, low-mid, presence, and air bands separately
create separate masters for streaming, club, podcast, and cinema targets

entries.title: Audio Repair For Clicks Noise And DC
causes: repair chain adding gain without final limiting
fixes: remove DC offset before dynamics processing
smooth isolated clicks with neighboring sample interpolation
use a gentle noise gate only below the musical floor
finish with soft limiting and leave headroom
